# Profanease

> Modern, lightweight profanity detection & content moderation toolkit for JavaScript/TypeScript. Detects l33t speak, homoglyphs, zero-width chars. Supports 25 languages, content categories for guard rails, and custom word lists. Works in Node.js, browsers, Deno, Bun, and edge runtimes.

## Installation

```
npm install profanease
```

## Quick Start

```ts
import { Profanease } from 'profanease';
import en from 'profanease/langs/en';

const filter = new Profanease({ languages: [en] });
filter.check('what the fuck');   // true
filter.clean('what the fuck');   // 'what the ****'
filter.analyze('what the fuck'); // { isProfane: true, matches: [...], severity: 'mild', cleaned: '...' }
```

## API

- `filter.check(text: string): boolean` — Does text contain profanity?
- `filter.clean(text: string): string` — Replace profane words with placeholders
- `filter.analyze(text: string): AnalysisResult` — Detailed match info, categories, severity, cleaned text
- `filter.addWords(words: string[]): void` — Add words to the filter at runtime
- `filter.removeWords(words: string[]): void` — Exclude words from filtering
- `filter.wordsList(lang?: string): string[]` — Get loaded word list
- `Profanease.custom(words, opts?)` — Create filter with ONLY your custom words (no defaults)

## Functional API (stateless)

```ts
import { check, clean, analyze } from 'profanease';
check('text', { languages: [en] });   // boolean
clean('text', { languages: [en] });   // string
analyze('text', { languages: [en] }); // AnalysisResult
```

## Options

- `languages: LanguagePack[]` — Language packs (import from profanease/langs/*)
- `list: string[]` — Additional custom words
- `exclude: string[]` — Words to skip
- `emptyList: boolean` — Start with no words
- `placeholder: string` — Censor character (default: '*')
- `replacement: 'asterisk' | 'grawlix' | 'word' | 'full' | (word) => string`
- `normalize: 'none' | 'basic' | 'moderate' | 'aggressive'` — Evasion detection level
- `categories: Category[]` — Only filter: 'profanity', 'sexual', 'slur', 'insult', 'religious', 'drugs', 'violence'

## AnalysisResult

```ts
{ isProfane: boolean, matches: MatchResult[], categories: Category[], severity: 'none'|'mild'|'moderate'|'severe', cleaned: string }
```

## MatchResult

```ts
{ original: string, normalized: string, matched: string, index: number, categories: Category[] }
```

## MCP Server

Profanease ships an MCP server for AI assistant integration:

```json
{ "mcpServers": { "profanease": { "command": "npx", "args": ["profanease-mcp"] } } }
```

Tools: `profanease_check`, `profanease_clean`, `profanease_analyze`
